choice: Redefine 'unattended' = no re-mapping (recommended), with foreground on-demand sync + reconnect prompt
rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: (1) Redefine 'unattended' in 7b0325f6 to mean 'no re-mapping of accounts is ever needed again' — the persisted account-link is what's automatic — explicitly NOT 'no re-auth'; the once-per-day OAuth handshake is unavoidable and is the price of E*TRADE's token model. (2) Sync is foreground and on-demand: it fires on app-open / visiting the tracking view and via an explicit 'Sync now' button, using whatever valid token exists that day; if the token is missing/expired (the normal state on a new day) we show the b45b7691 'Reconnect E*TRADE' prompt, and after the handshake the sync runs immediately against the persisted account-mapping. E*TRADE actuals thus refresh only on days the user opens the app and reconnects; manual/CSV remain the off-day fallback.)
